text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text: You heard a violin from the main hall, you say?

text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text:
It must have been me. I was using a room there at
that time. I hope the noise was not too much of a
distraction.

text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text: ...It wasn't? Well, I will still be careful next time.

text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text: I am yet amateurish at best, you see.
